name: datocms
description: DatoCMS skills for content delivery, content management, CLI workflows, frontend integrations, plugin development, plugin UI design, plugin scaffolding, and project setup

interface.shortDescription: Content delivery, management, CLI, frontend integrations, plugin dev, and project setup for DatoCMS
interface.longDescription: 8 focused skills for DatoCMS: query content (CDA/GraphQL), manage records and schema (CMA), run CLI workflows and migrations, integrate with frontend frameworks (Next.js, Nuxt, Astro, SvelteKit), build and design DatoCMS plugins, scaffold new plugin projects, and orchestrate one-time project setup including draft mode, visual editing, previews, and imports.
